# init(scene:)

**Initializer**

Initializes an import manager for a window scene.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor init(scene: UIWindowScene?)
```

## Parameters

- **scene**: Your app’s window scene. The manager presents the import sheet in this window.
title: init(scene:)
